mapper.sql: mockexam_paper_ref_id, source_type, source_paper_id, exam_category, exam_content, exam_board, subject_code, subject_name, paper_code, paper_name, duration_seconds, total_score, payload_adapter, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mockexam_paper_ref WHERE mockexam_paper_ref_id = #{paperRefId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM mockexam_paper_ref WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND source_paper_id = #{sourcePaperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM mockexam_paper_ref WHERE paper_code = #{paperCode} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT exam_content FROM mockexam_paper_ref WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' AND exam_category = #{examCategory} AND exam_content IS NOT NULL AND exam_content != '' ORDER BY exam_content ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE mockexam_paper_ref SET source_type = #{sourceType}, source_paper_id = #{sourcePaperId}, exam_category = #{examCategory}, exam_content = #{examContent}, exam_board = #{examBoard}, subject_code = #{subjectCode}, subject_name = #{subjectName}, paper_code = #{paperCode}, paper_name = #{paperName}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, total_score = #{totalScore}, payload_adapter = #{payloadAdapter}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE mockexam_paper_ref_id = #{mockexamPaperRefId}
UPDATE mockexam_paper_ref SET status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE mockexam_paper_ref_id = #{paperRefId}
